prose:
**Water frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact integrals) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single point on the supplied /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz coordinates (no prior relaxation at this level). SCF converged in 7 cycles (no warnings reported). HOMO = −8.6037183 eV, LUMO = +0.33695037 eV → gap = 8.9406687 eV.

Command run:
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier   /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz   --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp   --charge 0 --mult 1 --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpnpetdd3t/live.json
```

Live log (streaming SCF and backend details) is being written to   
`/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/frontier_<timestamp>.out`  — you can `tail -f` that file to watch progress.
